patch_description: Root cause: the prior ANSATZ_SPEC used heavy parameter sharing (all 9 RY gates shared a single ry_shared, similarly for rz_pre and rz_post). This مبارked-form specification can lead to mismatches between the inferred N_PARAMS_PER_BLOCK and how apply_ansatz_block indexes parameters, potentially causing validation or gradient issues in the test harness. The fix switches to a straightforward per-qubit parameterization: each RY, each pre-CZ RZ, and each post-CZ RZ uses its own unique parameter. This preserves the fixed data/feature map/training loop while ensuring the parameter counting and application are explicit and unambiguous. The CZ gates remain unchanged and adjacency constraints stay intact.
